request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While some push for massive civil defense spending, our neighbors in Canada maintain security with just 1.29% of GDP. They focus on smart preparedness, not fear-driven budgets. Why can't we prioritize practical readiness over endless spending? #NationalSecurity #SmartDefense
